full_text:
Guo Yong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Yongwas born in Anping. From a low offical family, managed to rise up the ranks. Guo Yong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Guo Yong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
